response.justification: Maria has extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Java, Kotlin, C++, Dlang) and frameworks (Node.js, React, Nest.js, Ember.js), with a strong focus on scalability, performance, and user-centric development. Her work on AI-agent infrastructure, cloud-native applications (AWS, Kubernetes), and real-time systems demonstrates deep technical expertise. However, her primary stack alignment (TypeScript/Node.js/React) is strong, but secondary skills like Kotlin/Java and AI agent development are less emphasized post-2020, and her lack of direct Vitest experience is a minor gap.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack development with deep experience in TypeScript/Node.js and React, matching the primary stack requirements.
Proven track record in scaling high-performance systems (handling millions of requests/sec) and AI-agent infrastructure, aligning with enterprise automation needs.
Strong collaboration and mentorship history, including workshops, code katas, and open-source contributions, indicating cultural fit.
concerns: Limited recent experience with Kotlin/Java (last mentioned in 2021) and no explicit mention of Vitest testing framework, though Jest is covered.
Primary stack alignment is strong, but secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java) and AI agent development are not consistently highlighted in recent roles.
Education includes non-traditional CS degrees (Photography/Video), though compensated by 15+ years of hands-on experience.
